Fan Li

Staff Machine Learning Engineer · Autonomy

🚗 Autonomous Driving 🧠 Deep Learning 🛠️ ML Infrastructure 📐 Math + CS
📧 fanli0318@gmail.com 📞 +1 (520) 271-2551

Hello 👋

I'm an ML engineer with a decade of production experience — from Google infrastructure and user modeling, to autonomous driving perception, prediction, and behavior at Pony.ai, Waymo, and now Rivian.

🎯 What I do
  • Build & ship deep learning models in production
  • Lead transitions to foundational / vision-LLM stacks
  • Design ML infra that scales across teams
🧰 Tools of the trade
  • Transformers, CNNs, BEV models, MotionLM
  • Lidar, radar, camera — multi-modal sensing
  • Distributed training, mixed precision, inference opt

By the numbers

10+
Years shipping production ML & systems
4
Top-tier autonomy / tech companies
40%
Memory reduction on Rivian BEV encoder
7
Teams served by ML infra at Pony.ai
40+
Production models on that infra
2×
Faster eval triage at Waymo

🚙 Rivian — Staff ML Engineer, Behavior

May 2023 — Present · Managing team of 3

Foundational models
  • Leading the shift of perception to world foundational models, unsupervised pre-training, and vision-LLMs
BEV perception
  • ~40% memory reduction on feature encoder (train + inference)
  • Enabled mixed-precision training across perception
Behavior prediction
  • Built the first behavior prediction DL models at Rivian
  • Marginal (Transformer) + joint (Auto-Regressive MotionLM)
Leadership
  • People management for a team of 3 engineers
  • Roadmap, hiring, technical direction

🛰️ Waymo — Senior SWE, Perception

Jan 2022 — May 2023

Distinguishing noise points vs. hard objects from lidar point clouds — semantic segmentation, object detection, data mining, and auto-labeling.

Data mining
  • Pipelines for niche data — dataset +50% in size
Dense point cloud model
  • Trained & released in all 4 major releases
  • Lead on 2 of them
All-weather eval
  • Built evaluation system covering all weather conditions
  • 2× reduction of manual triage time
Impact
  • Higher precision on the long tail that matters most for safety

🐎 Pony.ai — Senior Software Engineer

Mar 2019 — Dec 2021

ML Infrastructure
  • Built & supported company-wide ML infra
  • Used by 7 teams · 40+ models
  • Large-scale data gen, distributed training, runtime opt
Perception
  • 3D lidar point cloud — detection, classification, segmentation
  • New model from scratch — >5% mAP improvement
Prediction
  • Object trajectory and intention prediction
Span
  • End-to-end across infra, perception, and prediction stacks

🔍 Google — Software Engineer

Mar 2016 — Feb 2019

User Modeling · Proactive (2018–2019)
  • Processed large-scale user activity timelines
  • Productionalized interest-prediction model
  • Served 3 of top 10 Discover results
  • Built a new stack for proactive 3P content — a first at Google
Resource Management (2016–2018)
  • Early-stage member of new internal service
  • Optimized rack configuration for Google's data centers
  • New rack deployment: 1 year → 2 weeks

Education & research

🎓 UCLA
Graduate — Computer & Information Science
  • AI, Bayesian reasoning, problem solving, game theory
🎓 Shanghai Jiao Tong University
Dual Bachelor — CS, minor in Math
  • Algorithms, complexity, compilers, OS, networks
  • Linear algebra, discrete math, probability & stats
📄 Master comprehensive exam · 2015
Bayesian Network Structure Learning from Incomplete Data
  • Combined two SOTA results for tree-structure learning
📄 DEXA 2014 · First author
Efficient R-Tree Indexing on Dual-Port Servers
  • Distributed indexing for multi-dim queries in DCNs

What I bring

🚀 From research to production
  • Comfortable from paper-reading to on-vehicle deployment
  • Track record of first-of-its-kind models in production
🔬 Depth across modalities
  • Camera, lidar, radar
  • Transformers, CNNs, autoregressive models, foundational models
⚙️ Engineering rigor
  • ML infra that scales to dozens of models & teams
  • Memory, throughput, mixed precision — performance matters
🧭 Leadership
  • Lead engineer on multi-release efforts
  • People manager — currently a team of 3

Thank you

Let's build the future of autonomy.
